scripts.build: yarn typecheck && yarn workspace sveltinia build && yarn docs:build
scripts.publish:dry: yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.npm: env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_cache_folder -u npm_config_global_folder -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_git_message -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix npm
scripts.release:login: yarn npm login --registry https://registry.npmjs.org && yarn npm whoami --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.release:publish: yarn build && yarn npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.release:push: git push origin HEAD && git push origin v$(node -p 'require("./packages/sveltinia/package.json").version')
scripts.release:minor: yarn release:check && yarn release:login && cd packages/sveltinia && yarn npm version minor --no-package-lock --git-tag-version=true --commit-hooks=true -m "chore: release v%s" && cd ../.. && yarn release:publish && yarn release:push
scripts.release:major: yarn release:check && yarn release:login && cd packages/sveltinia && yarn npm version major --no-package-lock --git-tag-version=true --commit-hooks=true -m "chore: release v%s" && cd ../.. && yarn release:publish && yarn release:push
